problemNumber: 13
title: "Large Sum"

    code: |
      // https://projecteuler.net/problem=13
      
      // Work out the first ten digits of the sum of the following one-hundred 50-digit numbers.
      //
      // 37107287533902102798797998220837590246510135740250

      // 44889911501440648020369068063960672322193204149535
      // 41503128880339536053299340368006977710650566631954
      // 81234880673210146739058568557934581403627822703280
      // 82616570773948327592232845941706525094512325230608
      // 22918802058777319719839450180888072429661980811197
      // 77158542502016545090413245809786882778948721859617
      // 72107838435069186155435662884062257473692284509516
      // 20849603980134001723930671666823555245252804609722
      // 53503534226472524250874054075591789781264330331690
      
      // Answer: 5537376230
      
      #include <cstdint>
      #include <cmath>
      #include <fstream>
      #include <iostream>
      #include <iomanip>
      #include <sstream>
      #include <string>
      #include <unistd.h>
      
      template <typename T> T too_big( const char* num )
      {
        std::stringstream ss(num);
        T ret;
        return ss >> ret ? ret : 0;
      }
      
      std::string large_sum()
      {
        static const char* file_name = "./src/euler_13_data.txt";
      
        uint64_t sum = 0;
      
        std::ifstream fin(file_name);
      
        if( !fin.is_open() ){
          std::cerr << "Failed to open file: " << file_name << std::endl;
          return "-1";
        }
      
        for( std::string line ; std::getline(fin,line);){
          // We only care about first 11 (10 + 1) digits
          // We do not need 'Big Int' support
          sum += too_big<uint64_t>(line.substr(0,11).c_str());
        }
        return std::to_string(sum).substr(0,10);
      }
      
      #if ! defined UNITTEST_MODE
      int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
      {
        std::cout << "Answer: " << large_sum() << std::endl;
      }
      #endif // #if ! defined UNITTEST_MODE

          "44889911501440648020369068063960672322193204149535",

          "72107838435069186155435662884062257473692284509516",
          "20849603980134001723930671666823555245252804609722",
          "53503534226472524250874054075591789781264330331690"
        };
      
        public String solve() {
          BigInteger sum = BigInteger.ZERO;
          for (String num : NUMBERS) {
            sum = sum.add(new BigInteger(num));
          }
          String sumStr = sum.toString();
          return sumStr.substring(0, 10);
        }
      }

        "44889911501440648020369068063960672322193204149535",

      ];
      
      module.exports = {
        answer: () => {
          let sum = 0n;
          for (const num of numbers) {
            sum += BigInt(num);
          }
          const sumStr = sum.toString();
          return parseInt(sumStr.substring(0, 10));
        }
      };

              "66024396409905389607120198219976047599490197230297",
      
              "64913982680032973156037120041377903785566085089252",
      
              "16730939319872750275468906903707539413042652315011",
      
              "94809377245048795150954100921645863754710598436791",
      
              "78639167021187492431995700641917969777599028300699",
      
              "15368713711936614952811305876380278410754449733078",
      
              "40789923115535562561142322423255033685442488917353",
      
              "44889911501440648020369068063960672322193204149535",
      
              "41503128880339536053299340368006977710650566631954",
      
              "81234880673210146739058568557934581403627822703280",
      
              "82616570773948327592232845941706525094512325230608",
      
              "22918802058777319719839450180888072429661980811197",
      
              "77158542502016545090413245809786882778948721859617",
      
              "72107838435069186155435662884062257473692284509516",
      
              "20849603980134001723930671666823555245252804609722",
      
              "53503534226472524250874054075591789781264330331690",
      
          }
      
          sum := big.NewInt(0)
      
          for _, s := range numbers {
      
              n := new(big.Int)
      
              n.SetString(s, 10)
      
              sum.Add(sum, n)
      
          }
      
          sumStr := sum.String()
      
          fmt.Println(sumStr[:10])
      
      }

      // https://projecteuler.net/problem=13
      //
      // Work out the first ten digits of the sum of the following one-hundred 50-digit numbers.
      //
      // (numbers listed)

      // Answer: 5579483685

          "37107287533902102798797998220837590246510135740250",

          "34909793147580281078432689005635365870421514344394",
          "76730931414030874778888761218430663025842903171458",
          "28599367472858706780750373807426187109006069598453",
          "69277826542193267506564179383891946612994538008286",
          "64254777107681851681406197694561759198192630245842",
          "63887801967845902346870203108938187502071827085859",
          "56871514063245740468377571300791262708529019007845",
          "42089996553954755345932389561786749658605997225372",
          "88044592191214958864172450792285736119354493593248",
          "88387861211868702778316514408771837942008197418607",
          "83987872084193739095207446984993561589726599114022",
          "74807838395227922760765426394777544766814527986161",
          "67331451486364998791662708605079092872365891764305",
          "46894168769409759672207501173294615308949344935796",
          "63325219247777979085808587006003456086478348230780",
          "25128106761982511542524882744663111744605218771638",
          "30340103807551880861984330291684108231887041764979",
          "50797026958773498649647774793644991395517021696304",
          "40094690950920881089583797965646706562552019568853",
          "31242826306193972663758799145408887863213167922761",
          "73165391468845613100374519685941898108113947841850",
          "98504019757807987579015206979293783636505566952206",
          "56457542854185649241795964587124102263680979542148",
          "69842482700741964388820097291874818687238825223149",
          "65174627593587007805290928625133309557664169631020",
          "83348969012789918872609868893868091751304989514067",
          "26994430643148891498319854719251510679964281703243",
          "73167176531330624919225119674426574742355349194934",
          "37107287533902102798797998220837590246510135740250"
      ];
      
      pub fn large_sum_first_ten() -> String {
          let mut sum = vec![0; 100]; // enough for carry
          for num_str in NUMBERS {
              let digits: Vec<u32> = num_str.chars().rev().map(|c| c.to_digit(10).unwrap()).collect();
              let mut carry = 0;
              for i in 0..digits.len() {
                  let total = sum[i] + digits[i] + carry;
                  sum[i] = total % 10;
                  carry = total / 10;
              }
              let mut j = digits.len();
              while carry > 0 {
                  let total = sum[j] + carry;
                  sum[j] = total % 10;
                  carry = total / 10;
                  j += 1;
              }
          }
          sum.iter().rev().skip_while(|&&d| d == 0).take(10).map(|&d| (d as u8 + b'0') as char).collect()
      }
      
      #[cfg(test)]
      mod tests {
          use super::*;
      
          #[test]
          fn euler_013() {
              assert_eq!(large_sum_first_ten(), "5579483685");
          }
      }

## Additional Notes

This is Project Euler problem 13: Large Sum.

Work out the first ten digits of the sum of the following one-hundred 50-digit numbers. ( numbers listed ) Answer: 5537376230
